parts.label: PDK Transaxle Case
parts.function: The main alloy gear case housing the 7-speed PDK dual-clutch gear sets and shafts.

parts.label: Clutch / Bell Housing
parts.function: The bell housing at the engine end that encloses the dual-clutch pack and mates to the engine.

parts.label: Engine Mounting Flange
parts.function: The bolt flange that fixes the transaxle to the rear face of the engine block.

parts.label: Final Drive / Differential
parts.function: The final-drive gear set and differential that splits torque to the two rear driveshafts.

parts.label: Output Flange (Left)
parts.function: Connects the differential to the left rear driveshaft / CV joint.

parts.label: Output Flange (Right)
parts.function: Connects the differential to the right rear driveshaft / CV joint.

parts.label: Selector / Mechatronic Housing
parts.function: Houses the gear-selection mechanism and shift control linkage on top of the case.

parts.label: Mechatronic Control Unit
parts.function: The hydraulic/electronic control module that actuates the clutches and gear shifts.

parts.label: Transaxle Mount
parts.function: The rear rubber mount that supports the gearbox tail and isolates driveline vibration.

parts.label: Fluid Drain Plug
parts.function: Bottom plug drained to change the PDK transmission fluid.

parts.label: Fluid Fill Plug
parts.function: Side plug used to set the PDK fluid level when refilling.

parts.label: PDK Bellhousing / Transmission Case (Main)
parts.function: Aluminum alloy main structural case that encloses the entire PDK gear set and clutch assembly.

parts.label: PDK End Cover / Rear Cover
parts.function: Rear closing plate that seals the transmission case and provides bearing support at the tail end.

parts.label: PDK Oil Pan (Lower Sump)
parts.function: Lower sump that holds PDK-specific Pentosin FFL-2 fluid and houses the transmission filter.

parts.label: Dual Wet Clutch Pack Assembly (K1 + K2)
parts.function: Concentric wet multi-plate clutch pair where K1 engages odd gears and K2 engages even gears for seamless gear changes.

parts.label: Clutch Actuation Cylinder (Electro-Hydraulic)
parts.function: Electro-hydraulic cylinder that applies and releases each clutch pack under TCU command during gear selection.

parts.label: Torsional Damper / Flex Plate Adapter
parts.function: Replaces the conventional flywheel and connects the engine crankshaft to the PDK input with torsional damping.

parts.label: Input Shaft 1 (Inner, Odd Gears 1-3-5-7)
parts.function: Solid inner input shaft driven by K1 clutch that carries 1st, 3rd, 5th, and 7th gear drive gears.

parts.label: Input Shaft 2 (Outer, Even Gears 2-4-6-R)
parts.function: Hollow outer input shaft concentric with shaft 1, driven by K2 clutch, carrying 2nd, 4th, 6th, and reverse gears.

parts.label: Output Shaft / Lay Shafts
parts.function: Lay shafts that receive torque from the input shafts via the selected gear set and deliver it to the final drive.

parts.label: Gear Sets (1st through 7th + Reverse)
parts.function: Seven forward and one reverse helical-cut gear pairs providing the PDK ratio spread with low NVH.

parts.label: Synchronizer Rings and Hubs (x7)
parts.function: Blocker rings and hubs that match shaft speeds before dog engagement during pre-selected gear changes.

parts.label: Gear Selector Forks and Rods
parts.function: Electrohydraulically actuated selector forks that slide synchronizer sleeves to engage the pre-selected gear.

parts.label: PDK Hydraulic Control Unit / Valve Body
parts.function: Central valve body containing all shift solenoids and pressure regulators that direct fluid to clutches and selector actuators.

parts.label: PDK Electro-Hydraulic Shift Solenoids
parts.function: Multiple proportional solenoids within the HCU that modulate hydraulic pressure for clutch engagement and gear selection.

parts.label: PDK Fluid Pump (Electric)
parts.function: Electric oil pump that maintains PDK system line pressure independently of engine speed, enabling stop-start operation.

parts.label: PDK Fluid Filter and Oil Strainer
parts.function: Filter assembly that removes particulate contamination from the PDK hydraulic fluid circuit.

parts.label: PDK Fluid Temperature Sensor
parts.function: NTC sensor that monitors PDK fluid temperature so the TCU can adjust shift strategy and protect the clutch packs.

parts.label: Hypoid Final Drive / Ring and Pinion Gear Set
parts.function: 3.889:1 hypoid ring-and-pinion gear set that steps down gearbox output speed before the differential.

parts.label: Open Differential or LSD (Optional)
parts.function: Standard open differential (or optional torque-vectoring LSD) that distributes final drive torque between the rear wheels.

parts.label: Drive Flanges / Output Flanges (x2)
parts.function: Splined flanges bolted to each side of the differential that accept the rear driveshaft CV joints.

parts.label: Rear Driveshafts / Half-Shafts (x2)
parts.function: CV axles with tripod outer and ball-type inner joints that transmit final drive torque to each rear wheel hub.

parts.label: PDK TCU / Transmission Control Module
parts.function: Bosch TCU that manages all PDK shift logic, clutch pressure, and driver-mode strategies via CAN bus with the DME.

parts.label: PDK Gear Selector Unit (Cabin)
parts.function: Centre-console push-button selector providing D/R/N/P positions plus Sport and Sport+ mode input to the TCU.

parts.label: PDK Steering Wheel Shift Paddles
parts.function: Column-fixed paddles that send manual upshift and downshift requests to the TCU for driver-initiated gear changes.

parts.label: PDK Rotational Speed Sensors (Input + Output)
parts.function: Hall-effect sensors on the input and output shafts that provide real-time speed data for clutch slip and shift-point control.

parts.label: Clutch Release Bearing
parts.function: Concentric slave cylinder-type release bearing that disengages the clutch pack on hydraulic command from the TCU.

parts.label: PDK Fluid Heat Exchanger / Cooler
parts.function: Water-to-oil heat exchanger that regulates PDK fluid temperature by exchanging heat with the engine coolant circuit.

parts.label: Output Shaft Oil Seal (Drive Flange Seal)
parts.function: Radial lip seal at each output flange that prevents PDK fluid leakage where the driveshaft exits the differential housing.

parts.label: Gear Selector Shaft
parts.function: Internal selector shaft that translates gear lever / mechatronic commands into mechanical engagement of the synchronizer forks.

parts.label: Transaxle Mount Console / Bracket
parts.function: Structural console that bolts the hydro-mount to the chassis subframe and carries transaxle vertical and lateral loads.

parts.label: Input Shaft / Intermediate Shaft Seal Ring
parts.function: Sealing ring between the dual input shafts that prevents internal hydraulic pressure cross-leak between the two clutch oil circuits.

parts.label: PDK Oil Sump Gasket / Seal
parts.function: Sealing gasket between the lower oil sump and the main transmission case to prevent PDK fluid leakage.

parts.label: PDK End Cap O-Ring
parts.function: O-ring that seals the rear end cap to the transmission case, preventing fluid loss at the tail of the gearbox.

parts.label: Drive Flange Snap Ring / Retaining Ring
parts.function: Circlip that retains the output drive flange axially within the differential bearing carrier.

parts.label: Differential Bearing Bush
parts.function: Bronze bearing bush in the differential carrier that supports the drive flange and absorbs radial loads from the driveshaft.
